title: SpaceX kicks off wave of monster IPOs: What to know about companies going public
description: IPOs like SpaceX, Anthropic and OpenAI have dominated headlines lately, as a number of high-profile private companies announced they will become publicly traded firms. The hype is hard to ignore — but could these IPOs fall flat?
text: IPOs have dominated headlines lately, as a number of high-profile private companies. Announced they will become publicly traded firms. Much of the frenzy has focused on Elon Musk’s rocket-maker SpaceX. could. Be a record-breaking IPO when it starts trading on the Nasdaq on Friday. The hype is hard to ignore. but could these IPOs fall flat? CBC News looked into how a company goes public. benefits and. Whether buying in is a sure bet for investors. An IPO, or initial public offering, is the first time a company. Sells its shares to the public on a stock exchange.
